subject: AP Calculus AB

units.name: Differentiation: Composite, Implicit, and Inverse Functions

skills.name: Implementing Mathematical Processes
skills.description: Carry out mathematical rules, procedures, and technology-supported processes.

skills.name: Connecting Representations
skills.description: Connect verbal, analytical, graphical, numerical, and tabular representations.

skills.name: Justification
skills.description: Use definitions, theorems, tests, and reasoning to justify conclusions.

skills.name: Communication and Notation
skills.description: Use correct notation, units, mathematical language, and structured responses.

notes: AP Calculus AB data are Markdown + LaTeX structured content.
Images are local graph/table assets only, not full-question screenshots.
Classification and similarity are provisional until all AB years are stable.

unit_classification_authority.official_framework: AP Calculus AB Course and Exam Description
unit_classification_authority.policy: Official exam and subject framework materials are the only authority for unit classification.
unit_classification_authority.student_progression_rule: A question belongs to the earliest unit after which a student can answer it using that unit and prior units only.
